prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Visual acceptance, part of the Assembly & Fabrication scope. The observed field condition is: missed flash/burr on molded parts. The work is through its testing or inspection step. Reference material on hand: site visual standards, AIAG PPAP. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: Document check: Visual acceptance (production floor)
